mapper.insert: INSERT INTO instruction ( instruction_no, task_id, task_no, vehicle_id, vehicle_plate, device_id, command_id, instruction_type, instruction_content, status, operator_id, operator_name, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{instructionNo}, #{taskId}, #{taskNo}, #{vehicleId}, #{vehiclePlate}, #{deviceId}, #{commandId}, #{instructionType}, #{instructionContent}, 'PENDING', #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE instruction SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE instruction SET command_id = #{commandId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE instruction SET status = 'SENT', send_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE instruction SET status = 'RECEIVED', receive_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE instruction SET status = 'EXECUTING', execute_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE instruction SET status = 'COMPLETED', complete_time = NOW(), feedback = #{feedback}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE instruction SET status = 'FAILED', fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM instruction WHERE command_id = #{commandId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM instruction
AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM instruction WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM instruction WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM instruction WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
